target_audience: A framework operator deciding whether a successful and auditable runtime proof can be mistaken for actual user or business value proof.
expected_runtime_effect: The runtime proof may stay green while value evidence remains absent.
A successful outcome report about auditability should not be accepted as proof of user or business success by itself.
The retained next action should still point to broader evidence expansion rather than value success completion.
remaining_gap: This runtime-generated case proves missing value evidence on a positive auditability path, not on a vanity metric path.
A complementary runtime-generated OC-003 family should challenge local metric wins more directly.
